steps: Select colonies from the agar plate. Inoculate a portion of each colony into LB medium containing the appropriate antibiotic and incubate at 37 °C. Place the remaining portion of the colony into a correspondingly numbered PCR tube containing 25 µL of reaction mix (see below), and pipette to fully resuspend the bacteria.
Prepare the PCR reaction mix before starting Step 1 and keep the mix on ic
Gently mix the reaction components, then briefly centrifuge the tubes to collect the contents at the bottom.
Place the PCR tubes into the thermal cycler and run the following program:
